title: Packaging specifier filtering falls back to prereleases only when needed
prompt: Fix filter_versions so it matches packaging-style prerelease fallback behavior for this benchmark slice: when matching final releases exist they should be returned, but prereleases should be preserved when they are the only matching candidates.
golden_patch_description: Match packaging-style prerelease fallback for a narrow Specifier.filter slice without regressing simple stable filtering.
instance_notes: Compact packaging Specifier.filter slice derived from prerelease fallback semantics documented in packaging and covered in upstream specifier tests.
